title: Traditional banks — explore on official sites
intro: Neutral listings — not a ranking. Compare fees, products, and eligibility on each bank’s own pages before you apply.

items.reason: Large retail bank — common path for salary, rent, and everyday Dutch payments when you want a mainstream local stack.
Full-service bank with branch depth — useful when you may want mortgages or in-person help beyond a basic account.
Cooperative retail bank with strong domestic footprint — compare English UX and fees vs other majors for your region.

disclosure: Some links may be affiliate or referral links. If you use them, we may earn a commission at no extra cost to you. Ordering reflects page relevance, not pay-to-rank placement. Always confirm scope, pricing, and terms with the provider directly.
